articles.title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia - TechCrunch
articles.description: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.
articles.content: Micron, the Boise, Idaho-based memory chip maker, has captured Wall Street’s heart. Whether the love affair endures will heavily depend on how long the AI-driven supply crunch for memory chips lasts.… [+3797 chars]
